subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from the Wronged One unto those who have believed in the Name of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, that He may draw them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدی المظلوم الی الذین آمنوا باسم الله المهیمن القیوم لیجذبهم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @call to action
